data.title: NVIDIA and Intel team up for AI and computing development, with NVIDIA investing $5 billion in Intel stock for innovation.
data.description: NVIDIA and Intel have revealed a joint effort to create AI infrastructure and personal computing products. This partnership involves NVIDIA injecting $5 billion into Intel stock, aimed at boosting technological progress in the field.

data.title: Ripple's XRP jumps 3.95% to $3.13, eyes $3.38 resistance. Bullish trend expected to continue for potential breakout.
data.description: The value of XRP has surged to $3.13 driven by significant bullish momentum, with technical indicators suggesting a possible breakthrough above crucial resistance thresholds in upcoming trading sessions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market rallies after Fed rate cut, with Bitcoin hitting $117,201.67, Ethereum $4,581.02, XRP $3.13, Dogecoin $0.2804. Over $400.85 million liquidated, $51.3 million outflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs. Bitcoin at $120,000 target, possible rejection.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets experienced a surge on Thursday following the expected 25-basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve, boosting risk appetite for digital assets. Prices at a glance: Bitcoin (BTC) reached $117,201.67, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,581.02, Solana (SOL) at $246.71, XRP at $3.13, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2804, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001334. In the last 24 hours, Coinglass data revealed that 107,269 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses totaling $400.85 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicated net outflows of $51.3 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $1.9 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Wednesday. As per Crypto Caeser, Bitcoin surpassing $117,000 signifies a potential breakout towards $120,000, but facing rejection could lead to a different trajectory. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cizzle Brands introduces CWENCH Hydration™ in 149 Loblaws, Zehrs, and Real Canadian/Atlantic Superstore locations.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has shared that CWENCH Hydration™ products are now available in key stores owned by Loblaw Companies Limited (“LCL”) such as Loblaws, Zehrs, Your Independent Grocer, Real Canadian Superstore, and Atlantic Superstore. This expansion means that CWENCH Hydration™ can now be found in 149 locations across these popular banners. The flavors on offer include Blue Raspberry, Tropical Flow, and Rainbow.

data.title: Sprott Inc. adjusts index tracked by SGDJ ETF due to high gold miner returns; Solactive Junior Gold Miners Custom Factors Index up 90% YTD, causing $2B market cap ceiling issue.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Sprott Asset Management USA, Inc., a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., announced a minor adjustment to the index tracked by the Sprott Junior Gold Miners ETF (NYSE Arca: SGDJ). Year-to-date, as of September 16, 2025, gold miners, represented by the Solactive Junior Gold Miners Custom Factors Index, have shown impressive returns of over 90%. This significant growth has pushed the market capitalization of index constituents higher, with many junior gold miners surpassing the $2 billion market cap limit specified in Section 2.1 of the index methodology. In response, Solactive AG made a one-time alteration to the index guideline to maintain the index's weighting methodology integrity. This adjustment specifically impacts the security-level market capitalization requirement stated in Section 2.1 of the index methodology.

data.title: BNB price exceeds $990, hitting 52-week high at $992.81 with 4.05% gains. However, caution advised due to RSI at 76.42. Resistance near $1,006.88.
data.description: The Binance Coin has surged to a new 52-week high of $992.81, marking a daily increase of 4.05%. However, traders are advised to be cautious as the BNB Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 76.42, indicating a potential overbought condition. The upcoming resistance level is at $1,006.88, signaling a possible barrier for further gains.

data.title: N2OFF reports success with solar & energy storage projects in Germany, Italy, & Poland through partnership with Solterra. Transition to clean energy.
data.description: Neve Yarak, Israel - September 18, 2025 - N2OFF, Inc. (NASDAQ: NITO), a cleantech company focusing on solar energy assets with the RTB model, revealed substantial advancements in its solar and energy storage ventures. The Company marked successful completion of vital projects in Germany, Italy, and Poland, as part of its collaboration with Solterra Renewable Energy Ltd. N2OFF is pushing forward a strong portfolio of renewable energy endeavors in partnership with Solterra, showcasing dedication to propelling the worldwide clean energy shift.

data.title: Major institutions like BlackRock and JPMorgan are quietly embracing blockchain for financial solutions. BlackRock's tokenized U.S. Treasury fund, BUIDL, aims to provide institutions and investors with blockchain benefits. Fidelity offers FDIT for tokenized exposure to Treasuries. These innovations prioritize stability and regulation over volatile tokens.
data.description: Major financial institutions like BlackRock and JPMorgan are silently adopting blockchain solutions for decentralized finance (DeFi). They are prioritizing stability, regulation, and scalability over volatile tokens or speculative DeFi protocols. BlackRock has introduced BUIDL, a tokenized U.S. Treasury fund, to incorporate money market and short-term Treasury holdings on public blockchains. Fidelity also offers a similar product, FDIT, providing tokenized exposure to U.S. Treasuries in a regulated environment. These initiatives focus on blockchain settlement, digital custody, and transparency for institutions and qualified investors, emphasizing compliance and avoiding typical crypto asset volatility. This marks a shift in how large financial operators view and adopt DeFi technologies.

data.title: ETH hovers around $4,600 with stablecoin liquidity reaching a record $171B. Trading at $4,574 (+1.80%), $77.6M outflows encourage accumulation despite resistance.
data.description: The price of Ethereum is currently at $4,574, showing a 1.80% increase, as it consolidates below a crucial resistance level. Despite trading sideways, there are signs of accumulation as a significant amount of stablecoin liquidity and $77.6 million outflows have been observed.

data.title: New partnership between OGG and Bridger to enhance methane detection in Oklahoma, prioritizing safety & reducing emissions.
data.description: A company based in Bozeman, Montana, named Oklahoma Gas Gathering LLC ("OGG") has revealed a fresh collaboration with Bridger Photonics Inc. The latter is known as a top provider of emissions data globally. The initiative aims to boost effectiveness and safety within OGG's midstream operations in the Anadarko Basin. By leveraging Bridger's cutting-edge methane detection technology, OGG is focused on enhancing operational efficiency while also prioritizing emission reduction efforts. This partnership underscores OGG's dedication to minimizing emissions and maximizing gas conservation within their operations. Through the utilization of Bridger's state-of-the-art technology and advanced analytics, OGG is taking steps to ensure enhanced operational standards.

data.title: NYSE announces 2nd annual International Day on October 23, 2025 to promote global business with C-suite.
data.description: The 2nd annual NYSE International Day is scheduled to take place on October 23, 2025, at the New York Stock Exchange. This event aims to commemorate global business achievements and encourage international cooperation in innovation and investment. It will gather top executives to promote cross-border partnerships and strengthen connections in the business world.
